overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt trail through a lush, vibrant countryside. The journey progresses from a dense forested area with colorful wildflowers to an open landscape with distant mountain views, culminating in crossing a rustic stone bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested nature trail with wildflower meadows

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest trail with swords on his back, surrounded by dense greenery

entered.detail: tall trees forming a thick canopy overhead with dappled sunlight
lush grass with vibrant red, purple and white wildflowers
winding dirt trail with visible tire tracks and footprints
large green shrubbery lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt trail through a dense forest. The path is flanked by lush wildflower meadows on the left and thick bushes on the right, while tall trees form a canopy overhead creating dappled lighting patterns on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside with distant mountain views

events.description: exiting dense forest canopy into open countryside with expansive sky views
trail intersection becomes visible with a rural cottage appearing on the left hillside

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains and a lakeside cottage

entered.detail: individual trees spaced apart across the rolling landscape
blue-hued mountains visible on the horizon under the bright sky
small traditional house with sloped roof situated on a hillside
calm body of water visible in the distance beyond the fields

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into wide countryside as Geralt leaves the forest behind. Distant mountains become visible on the horizon, and a quaint wooden cottage appears on the left hillside. The trail continues through scattered trees with vibrant wildflowers now lining the right side, while a blue lake shimmers in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge crossing over small valley

events.description: transitioning from dirt trail onto ancient stone bridge with wooden railings

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the stone bridge while looking toward the distant landscape beyond

entered.detail: weathered cobblestone bridge with mossy surface crossing a small valley
rustic wooden fence with vertical posts along both sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches and crosses an ancient stone bridge with weathered wooden railings. The bridge offers elevated views of the surrounding countryside, with the distant mountain range still visible ahead. The path transitions from dirt to cobblestone underfoot as he makes his way across the span.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from a sheltered forest canopy into a vast, open countryside. It begins on a winding dirt trail flanked by wildflower meadows and thick bushes, where tall trees create dappled lighting patterns across the path. As the forest thins, the scene opens into a wide landscape revealing a quaint wooden cottage on a hillside and a shimmering blue lake beneath distant mountains. The trail then leads through scattered trees and vibrant flora before turning toward an ancient stone bridge with weathered wooden railings. Finally, the path transitions from dirt to cobblestone as the camera crosses the span, offering an elevated view of the surrounding valley and the mountain range ahead.
